final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original digital illustration of a dark gothic castle interior (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a 暗黑哥特 aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include towering vaulted ceiling as dominant vertical element
Subject: must include the gothic castle interior with high arched vault, stained glass windows casting blood-red light, candelabras, and iron chain decorations
Scene/backdrop: must include a grand gothic interior space with heavy shadows throughout
Lighting/mood: needs a mysterious and oppressive atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours; must include blood-red colored light streaming through stained glass windows as primary light source
Color palette: needs a dark, shadow-dominant direction with blood-red accent light — exact tonal ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs heavy stone, aged iron, and candlelight surface treatment — exact grain and texture weight are yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default
Avoid:
